name: data_read
description: Read and parse structured data files (CSV, Excel, JSON, JSONL) from the data directory. Returns column names, row count, data types, and a sample of rows. Use before python_execute to understand the data structure.

path.description: Path to the data file, relative to FILE_READ_BASE_DIR

sample_rows.description: Number of sample rows to return (default 10, max 100)

sheet_name.description: For Excel files: sheet name or index. Defaults to first sheet.

sample.description: First N rows as list of dicts

dtypes.description: Column name to inferred data type mapping

file_format.description: Detected file format (csv, excel, json, jsonl)
